creator: carlavilla@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #0)

> Better, IMHO: remove both bullet points, then have #_sites_using_freebsd anchor > to a simple sentence that includes the link to the Foundation page.

I also prefer this option too, can you please prepare a sentence for the link?
Something like:

== Sites using FreeBSD

The sentence link:https://freebsdfoundation.org/freebsd-project/what-is-freebsd/[text-for-the-link]
